Bob Dylan

San Jose 98 Soundboard (1cd)

Silver cd - Switch (NCH) audio rip - Flac Level 8

01.Absolutely sweet Marie
02.The Man in Me
03.Cold Irons Bound
04.Just Like a Woman
05.Silvio
06.Stone Walls and Steel Bars (acoustic)
07.Masters of War (acoustic)
08.Tangled Up in Blue (acoustic)
09.Make You Feel My Love
10.Highway 61 Revisited
11.Forever Young (acoustic)
12.Love Sick
13.Rainy Day Women

Recorded Live from the soundboard San Jose CA USA 19th May 1998

Enjoy

The Cowboy
